entries.title: Dear webpage=C2=A0 team,
entries.content: Dear webpage=C2=A0 team,

entries.title: Hi! I=E2=80=99m Ihor, a representative of company!...
entries.content:
Hi! I=E2=80=99m Ihor, a representative of company! http://company.net/ - a =
fully automated platform for intellectual property (IP) protection. As a fe=
llow startup, we understand how it is important to protect your product and=
 show the protection level for investors.

entries.title: Our technology allows you to certify your object o...
entries.content:
Our technology allows you to certify your object of IP rights (design, soft=
ware, pictures, content, etc.) monitors and protects your digital assets 24=
/7 and worldwide, allowing you to delete copyright violations in just 5 sec=
onds, without the burden of expensive legal fees and stacks of paper. We kn=
ow from our 10+ years of experience in IP protection how to do it simple an=
d fast.=C2=A0

entries.title: We are protecting clients products from the time o...
entries.content:
We are protecting clients products from the time of creation till successfu=
l realization on the market.

entries.title: I am contacting you because we looked through your...
entries.content:
I am contacting you because we looked through your site webpage.com=C2=A0 a=
nd want to emphasize that you are a great startup with a powerful product t=
hat has to be protected.

entries.title: Please do not hesitate to contact me https://compa...
entries.content:
Please do not hesitate to contact me https://company.youcanbook.me, if you =
want to get one free certificate that proves the rights of your product and=
 40% discount for future certificates with promocode COPYRIGHT40.

entries.title: We would be happy to learn more about your IP issu...
entries.content:
We would be happy to learn more about your IP issues and show you how easy =
it could be to deal with them with a demo.=C2=A0

entries.title: Our presentation deck is here:=C2=A0
entries.content: Our presentation deck is here:=C2=A0

entries.title: company! Sales Deck (Startups) https://docs.google...
entries.content:
company! Sales Deck (Startups) https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1-kuu=
50CZOfIRAaJnycxQyQGpvIbeGO1B4_xJxW_pynY/edit?usp=3Dsharing

entries.title: Looking forward to getting to know you and learnin...
entries.content:
Looking forward to getting to know you and learning more about your IP issu=
es.

entries.title: Please feel free to contact me if you have any que...
entries.content: Please feel free to contact me if you have any questions:
